title: Home
name: Renan Alves
bio: Programmer with over 3 years of experience in creating and maintaining full-stack software, with a focus on robustness, efficiency, and maintainability.

technologies.title: Technologies
technologies.php: Language I work with daily. +3 years.
technologies.laravel: Powerful framework used alongside PHP. +3 years.
technologies.typescript: Typing for the front-end, used daily. 3 years.
technologies.vue: Modern SPAs with and without Inertia. 3 years.
technologies.tailwind: CSS framework I use with Vue. 2 years.
technologies.go: Freelance projects, combined with Vue, also used for CLIs. 2 years.
technologies.postgres: DBMS I've used in some educational and freelance projects. +3 years.

technologies.inertia: Tool that combines Vue and Laravel, current use. 2 years.

items.title: Full-Stack Developer
items.company: Federation of Industries of Mato Grosso (FIEMT)
tasks: Maintenance and development of systems with PHP, Laravel, Vue.js, Inertia.js and Tailwind
Creation of modern and standardized user interfaces with PrimeVue
Implementation of granular user management and permissions for access flexibility.
Creation of a multi-channel notification system (DB, WebSocket with Reverb, Email, Push Notifications)
Deployment of applications using Docker
Deployment automation with Github Actions
Development of unit and integration tests with PHPUnit and Pest
Creation of E2E tests with Cypress and Playwright to validate accessibility
Use of JIRA for task management
Deployment of applications with Laravel Octane and Swoole for high performance
Use of tools like Laravel Data and Laravel Typescript Transformer by Spatie for strong typing between frontend and backend

items.title: Freelance Developer
tasks: Creation of a web system based on Brazilian legislation for managing administrative processes.
Creation of a web system for managing family services in CRAS units.
Creation of a system for managing government purchases, also based on legislation.
Test development with PHPUnit and Vitest.
Creation of intuitive dashboards with Apex Charts and Charts.js.
Automated tools for CSV data import and PDF/Word data export.
Development of code documentation.
Application deployment using Docker.

items.title: Intern
tasks: Maintenance and new features in a public bidding management system.
Creation of an environmental license management system.
Creation of intuitive dashboards with Charts.js.
Creation of a Java Android application for ticket management.
Container orchestration and application deployment using Docker.

items.title: Educational and Scientific
tasks: Development of the scientific project MyBITS, awarded regionally in Crato - CE and competitor in Fortaleza - CE in the Robotics and Automation category.
Development of the scientific project MeGuia.ai, competitor in the Robotics and Automation category in Crato-CE.
